properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 28/14
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 281830 UTC MARCH 14. 
   NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

   65-02.7N 006-56.6E DEEPSEA BERGEN
65-22.1N 007-21.3E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN
71-15.6N 022-15.7E SCARABEO 8
72-20.1N 018-28.7E TRANSOCEAN BARENTS
72-24.2N 020-08.0E WEST HERCULES

   NOTES: 
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
        B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT
           WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
     2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 24/14
